title: Phonak AI-Powered Hearing Aids Recognized with 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards
author: Phonak/Sonova
description: Phonak announced that its Virto R Infinio and Infinio Ultra Sphere hearing aids have won the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards from the Business Intelligence Group. Both products were recognized in the health category for using AI to enhance speech clarity and reduce background noise in real-world listening environments. The Virto R Infinio uses AI to recognize listening environments and adjust settings in real-time, while the Infinio Ultra Sphere uses deep neural networks to process sound signals and separate speech from noise.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: As Phonak's parent company, Sonova benefits from the recognition of Phonak's award-winning products and innovation leadership. The awards reinforce Sonova's commitment to innovation and strengthen its competitive position in the hearing care market.

title: Phonak Infinio Ultra Sphere and Virto R Infinio win 2026 iF DESIGN AWARD
author: Not Specified
description: Phonak announced that its Infinio Ultra Sphere and Virto R Infinio hearing aids have received the prestigious 2026 iF DESIGN AWARD. The awards recognize the products' seamless integration of breakthrough AI technology, intuitive usability, and refined industrial design. The Virto R Infinio has also previously won the 2025 HHTM Hearing Technology Innovator Award and 2026 BIG Innovation Award since its 2025 launch.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: As Phonak's parent company, Sonova benefits from the positive recognition of Phonak's award-winning products. The article highlights Sonova's strong financial performance (CHF 3.9 billion in sales) and its ranking as the 12th most innovative company in Europe, supporting continued growth momentum.

title: Audiology Devices Market Size Expected to Hit USD 27.10 Billion by 2034
author: Precedence Research
description: The global audiology devices market is projected to grow from USD 15.67 billion in 2025 to USD 27.10 billion by 2034, with a 6.27% CAGR. Europe leads the market, while technological innovations, AI integration, and expanding over-the-counter options are driving growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Recognized as a global leader in surgically implanted hearing solutions with a specialized product portfolio
Comprehensive hearing care solutions across multiple brands and recent technological innovations like AI-powered hearing aids

title: Hearing Aid Devices Market, Competitive Landscape and Market Forecast to 2030
author: Globe Newswire
description: The global hearing aid devices market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.45% from 2024 to 2030, driven by the rising burden of hearing loss, increased exposure to high-intensity sounds, and growing awareness and screening programs. Digital hearing aids are expected to hold a significant market share, with advancements in technology and features.

title: U.S. Hearing Aids Market Analysis 2024-2030: Adoption Expected to Rise with FDA's New Over-the-Counter Guidelines
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The U.S. hearing aids market is expected to reach $3.01 billion by 2030, driven by the increasing adoption of advanced hearing aids and the rising prevalence of hearing loss among the aging population. The FDA's new guidelines for over-the-counter hearing aids are also expected to boost market growth.
